title: per-frame UTCDate::to_string() alloc in message render
description: main.rs line 169: msg.sent_at.to_string() allocates a new String on every frame for every visible message. UTCDate already implements AsRef<str> and Deref<Target=str>, so ui.label() can accept &*msg.sent_at or msg.sent_at.as_str() with zero allocation. Hot path: runs at egui frame rate (typically 60 fps) times the number of visible messages. At 100 visible messages this is 6000 heap allocations/sec for no reason.
